test_cases.description: Simple feature using Fast mode — tasks only
test_cases.prompt: /epic:task Add email validation to the user profile form
assertions: Generates tasks.md with frontmatter containing scale: fast
Tasks use format '- [ ] N - Name' (not bold, not [T1] prefix)

test_cases.description: Medium bugfix using Standard mode — story + tasks
test_cases.prompt: /epic:task Fix: login form submits but returns blank page instead of redirect to dashboard
assertions: Unchanged Behavior has >= 2 items with 'SHALL CONTINUE TO'

test_cases.description: Complex feature using Full mode — all artifacts
test_cases.prompt: /epic:task Build a workspace invitation system with email notifications, role-based permissions, and audit logging
assertions: Triage detects Moderate or High complexity
design.md contains at least one Mermaid diagram (```mermaid block)
Every R-number in story.md appears in at least one task's Requirements field

test_cases.description: Brand new project with no existing code or .epic directory
test_cases.prompt: /epic:task Build a REST API for a todo app from scratch — this is a brand new project with no existing code
assertions: Does not fail or reference non-existent files
Includes EARS primer in triage (first story detection)
Triage proposal includes all required fields
Handles absence of CLAUDE.md, spec.md, roadmap.md gracefully

test_cases.description: Vague request requiring clarification before proceeding
assertions: Asks for clarification about what to organize
Does not crash or produce empty story

test_cases.description: Request sounds simple but reveals high complexity requiring mode upgrade
test_cases.prompt: /epic:task Add a dark mode toggle to the settings page — needs to persist preference in DB, sync across devices, respect system preferences, handle SSR hydration mismatch, and update all 47 themed components
assertions: Triage detects Moderate or High complexity despite simple-sounding start
Explains trade-off of choosing a lighter mode
